## Featured Article – Toronto Sun

## Featured Article – Toronto Sun
Managing Partner, Evan Green provided his perspective to the Toronto Star on the challenges of Canada’s visa approval process, emphasizing the high standards applicants must meet and the broader implications for businesses engaging with international expertise.
